name: Protea
description: Protea knows all about protection. Her vast arsenal inflicts damage and provides ally support. She can even manipulate time itself.
passiveDescription: Every |CASTS|th Power Cast is granted +|STRENGTH|% Ability Strength.

abilities.name: Grenade Fan
abilities.description:
Throw out grenades in an arc.

(TAP) SHRAPNEL VORTEX
Creates a slashing, staggering swirl of shrapnel.

(HOLD) SHIELD SATELLITES
Protea reconfigures Grenades to work as overcharging shield generators, protecting her, her allies and companions. When Shields break, a Satellite is destroyed to double minimum Shield Gate invincibility time.

abilities.name: Blaze Artillery
abilities.description: Deploys an artillery unit to blast plasma charges at enemies it faces. Each enemy hit increases the power of subsequent plasma attacks.

abilities.name: Dispensary
abilities.description: Deploys a device that generates 3 pickups after a short delay: empowered health orb, universal ammo pack and energy orb.

abilities.name: Temporal Anchor
abilities.description:
Drops a Temporal Anchor which, after a short duration, Protea rewinds to trigger a temporal implosion. Implosion damage increases based on damage dealt between anchor drop and rewind. Everything lost or expended in that time is returned.
Dying while Anchor is active rewinds Protea to the anchor, saving her. Protea is knocked down and the anchor vanishes.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Protea knows all about protection. Her vast arsenal inflicts damage and provides ally support. She can even manipulate time itself.

drops.location: Cephalon Simaris, Complete The Deadlock Protocol

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Protea Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Protea Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Protea Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Protea’s abilities.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: The empowered Health Orbs generated by Protea’s Dispensary remain the same (100 Health per Orb).

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed loss of function after Melee slamming just as Temporal Anchor expires and beginning rewinding Protea. As reported here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/xtzley/my_protea_is_broken_i_need_a_new_one/
Fixed many Syandanas clipping through Protea’s Caladrius Skin hip mesh.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.12
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea’s (thrown) Grenade Fan ignoring stat modifiers from equipped mods in various different scenarios. Notably if a grenade collides with Protea immediately on cast or while standing on Deimos Exocrine. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1242892-proteas-shield-grenades-ignore-equipped-mods-when-landing-incorrectly/

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Protea Caladrius Skin’s helmet visor tilting to the side permanently after casting her Grenade Fan. As reported here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/xe93xd/protea_visor_bug/

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Protea

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed being unable to pick up universal ammo (such as ammo from ammo dispensers in the Simulacrum or Protea’s Dispensary) if the player only has a secondary weapon equipped. 
Fixed clipping issues with Protea’s Caladrius skin during her idles. 
Fixed the Protea Monitivus Thrown Weapon skin missing the projectile details in the pouch attachment.
Fixed the Protea Caladrius skin fur-like collar appearing wet with a green tint when using the Classic Engine.
Fixed the Protea Caladrius Glyph missing details such as her feather/fur collar.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
The Protea Caladrius Collection is available for purchase in the in-game Market.
Fixed Protea's Temporal Anchor not counting damage to Overguard when building up damage for the temporal implosion blast.
patchlogs.fixes:
Enter Kahl-175. Having survived his brush with the Sentients, and now free from their shackles, he emerges as the Origin System’s newest savior. Wield his explosive Grineer armaments as you race against time to rescue your Brothers from Narmer’s oppressive clutches. Battle Archons alongside your Squadmates, meet the 50th Warframe Styanax*, take on all-new Missions, bend time with the Protea Caladrius Collection, and much more!
Fixed Protea’s Blaze Artillery at times temporarily preventing certain inputs from working (melee for example) during the throwing animation.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Protea’s Temporal Anchor.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea’s Grenade Fan and Shield Satellites appearing massive when using Archwing.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea’s Temporal Anchor forcing you out of your Operator in transference disabled areas (eg. Void Manifestation arena).

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea's default helmet using the Telema Helmet icon in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Protea Technochron Skin by Master Noob

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Added a (non scaling) area-of-effect around Harrow that gets hit by it, similar to Proteas Blaze Artillery, to address hitting enemies that are right on top of you.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.additions: Lavos, Sevagoth, Xaku, Yareli, Baruuk, Gauss, Hildryn, Wisp, Protea and Grendel are now available and can be used in Frame Fighter once their Fragments have been found/Scanned.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error related to Protea getting on a K-Drive.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to pick up universal Ammo (Lavo’s Transmutation Probe, Protea’s Dispensary, etc) when Yareli is on Merulina.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Protea Shield grenades

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea's Blaze Artillery trying to target untargetable enemies.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous Armor pieces being misaligned on Protea.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea not removing respective “gadgets” from her utility belt for Blaze Artillery and Dispensary when the Kollapsar Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.1.0
patchlogs.changes:
featuring our first-ever Protea, Grendel and Revenant Skins!
Protea Kollapsar Skin by led2012

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error when using Protea’s Temporal Anchor in Railjack. 
Fixed a script error that would occur in the Sacrifice if you used Protea's Temporal Anchor right before Transferring into Umbra.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Intermission III: Update 29.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Added Lavos Cordatus, Mag Gauss, Protea Mavv, Protea Telema, and Xaku Kintsu Helmet Blueprints to the Nightwave Store rotation.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the final mission on The Deadlock Protocol Quest not being completable (the boss fight with Protea).

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a crash associated with the Protea boss fight. 
Partially fixed a progression stopper with the Protea boss fight. We are still working on this issue, it is not fully resolved! Apologies!

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea’s Dispensary minimap icon not disappearing if you’re not in the same tile when the ability expires.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Protea’s Blaze Artillery ability.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a small time window after Protea’s dodge where you were unable to cast Abilities.
Fixed Protea not using her special dodge forward/left anims when using a Whip.
Fixed Protea's Shield Satellites orbiting at the feet of AI.
Fixed other players being able to see Protea’s Blaze Artillery hit counter.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Protea losing her Temporal Anchor actions during rewind if during the ability she walked through Volt’s Electric Shield. 
Fixed Protea's Blaze Artillery not targeting enemies in Mag's Magnetize bubble if Mag is Modded to have a high Power Strength.
Fixed a script error that could occur if a Protea died or left the squad with a Grenade Fan active on an ally.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a case of Protea’s Blaze Artillery not damaging ragdolled enemies.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.6 + 28.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Protea’s sprint speed to 1.2.
Removed the increased animation speed for Protea’s custom Roll animation to bring it back to what was originally showcased.
Slightly increased the impulse of Protea’s custom Roll when moving forward.
Fixed Protea's Grenade Fan/ Shield Satellites appearing giant while using Archwing.
Protea’s Blaze Artillery will now shoot through Volt’s Shield, but won't benefit from its buffs.
Fixed Protea’s Blaze Artillery not targeting ragdolled enemies.
Protea’s Dispensary location is now displayed on the minimap in the form of the Ability icon.
Protea is now invulnerable for the first 3 seconds of Temporal Anchor (i.e on cast, to prevent casting animation deaths).
Protea’s Blueprint has been added to Simaris’ Offerings for players who have completed The Deadlock Protocol Quest and unintentionally sold Protea.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Helminth Cyst being on the wrong side of Protea’s neck. 
Fixed a script error when casting Protea’s Grenade Fan.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Protea’s Passive showing as 0 if you Transfer in/out of the Operator as the Client.
Fixed casting Protea’s Grenade Fan multiple times in the same spot causing black particle FX to stack.
Fixed Protea's Skin being labeled Protea instead of Protea Skin in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed crash when using Protea's Temporal Anchor Ability. .
Fixed Protea’s Grenade Fan having a higher base Duration on Rank 1 and 2. The base Durations are now all a consistent 10s.
Fixed Protea’s Temporal Anchor path getting reset after throwing the Xoris.
Fixed a script error when casting Protea’s Grenade Fan Ability.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea Ability sounds not ducking when a Transmission is playing.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed lingering red spark FX after picking up a Health Orb from Protea’s Dispensary until all players have picked it up.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes:
The Deadlock Protocol sheds new light on the industrious origins of the Corpus, introduces the time-bending Warframe, Protea and includes a remastered Corpus fleet full of innovative threats and escalating security measures.
*Players who purchase the Protea Warframe before playing the Quest will receive a Riven as an additional reward.
Protea is the first Warframe to have a Universal Aura Polarity to accompany her set of utility skills!
*Drusus is seeking out myths and legends about Protea and will update the Leverian when he is ready.
*Earn the Protea In Action Glyph during a limited time 72 hour weekend Alert on PC, starting Friday, June 12th @ 2 PM ET. Console will also run this Alert when The Deadlock Protocol Quest is live on their respective Platforms!
*Protea’s Alternate Helmets will be added to the Nightwave Cred Offerings once The Deadlock Protocol is live on all Platforms.
